S.FORM: Iran Itini i 32 00 N, 53 00 E, noAsiya ko Iran. Polong no sekalay i 1,648,195 sq km "saka 18 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,531,595 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 116,600 sq km " Polong i 82,801,633 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 30.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 6.80%, malo no roma to a sera 63.10%. siyoto O (((Tehran)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Hassan Rouhani , patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 4 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, ***,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((t…ôńßran)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakas…ôpat * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i ńßassan ro~uo~u~uńßani , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Iran Itini i 32 00 N, 53 00 E, noAsiya ko Iran. Polong no sekalay i 1,648,195 sq km "saka 18 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,531,595 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 116,600 sq km " Polong i 82,801,633 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 30.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 6.80%, malo no roma to a sera 63.10%. siyoto O (((Tehran)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Hassan Rouhani , patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 4 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
